vocab.meaning: nghi thức chải chuốt/vệ sinh cá nhân
vocab.example: I wouldn't say I'm vain, but checking the mirror is an essential part of my morning grooming ritual to ensure I look presentable.

vocab.meaning: cái nhìn lướt qua nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I usually just steal a fleeting glance at my reflection before heading out the door to make sure my hair isn't a mess.

vocab.meaning: tự ý thức về bản thân (thường là lo lắng về ngoại hình)
vocab.example: In my teenage years, I was quite self-conscious and would spend ages in front of the glass, but now I’m much more relaxed.

vocab.meaning: xem xét kỹ lưỡng ngoại hình của ai đó
vocab.example: I only really scrutinize my appearance when I have an important job interview or a formal event to attend.
Constantly staring at oneself in every reflective surface can sometimes be perceived as having narcissistic tendencies.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự tự tin của ai đó
vocab.example: Occasionally, a quick look in the mirror can boost my confidence if I feel that my outfit is particularly well-coordinated.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng/thể hiện một hình ảnh chỉn chu
vocab.example: As a professional, it is important to check the mirror periodically to ensure I present a polished image to my clients.
I'm fascinated by how lighting can completely change the quality of an optical reflection in the mirror.
I check the rearview mirror while driving mostly out of habit, but I also do the same when passing shop windows.

vocab.meaning: khuyết điểm về thể chất/ngoại hình
vocab.example: I try not to dwell on my physical flaws when looking in the mirror; instead, I focus on the overall look.
